task.title: Remove deprecated evidence/index surfaces and enforce hot validation retention
task.summary: Deprecate `.codewiki/evidence/**` and legacy `.codewiki/index/`, add drift checks for stale file-contract paths and `.wiki` references, and evict cold pass validation/build artifacts from the hot working tree after safe Git archival.

goal.outcome: CodeWiki no longer treats `.codewiki/evidence/**` or `.codewiki/index/` as active contract surfaces; deterministic drift checks catch deprecated paths and stale `.wiki` references; pass validation/build artifacts become purgeable after safe archival while fail/block/policy-kept reports remain hot.
acceptance: `.codewiki/index/` and stale `.codewiki/evidence/**` files are removed or migrated, and templates/config no longer create or advertise them as default active paths.
Docs define execution evidence as implementation builds, validation truth as hot fail/block/policy-required/current reports, and research/source support outside `.codewiki/evidence/**`.
Lint/graph health flags deprecated CodeWiki paths and stale `.wiki` references as deterministic file-contract drift.
Graph GC/archive views mark pass validation reports and consumed cold builds purgeable after safe Git archive/publication while preserving fail/block/policy-kept validation as hot.
Tests cover deprecated path detection, stale `.wiki` detection, and validation/build hot-retention classes.
non_goals: Do not delete fail/block/policy-kept validation reports.
Do not rewrite Git history or delete archive refs.
Do not remove current active implementation builds before publication safety passes.
Do not build the full restore command if explicit archive restore metadata already exists.

summary: Implemented deprecated `.codewiki/evidence/**` and `.codewiki/index/**` removal, codewiki.patch naming, file-contract lint drift, and hot validation/build retention classes.

evidence: Focused smoke test creates deprecated directories and stale legacy dot-wiki reference, then asserts lint issues.
Focused graph fixture verifies safe archived implementation build and pass validation are purgeable, not hot.
Full smoke test updated to bootstrap without `.codewiki/evidence` seed and to apply source-support patches under `.codewiki/sources/**`.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Config/template/gateway defaults removed `.codewiki/evidence/**` write/read paths and added sources/research patch paths.
Project/rebuilder defaults use `.codewiki/research` instead of evidence fallback.
Graph accepts archivedTaskIds, suppresses clean historical accepted-build drift, and exposes purgeable validation/build classes.
Lint enforces deprecated path and legacy dot-wiki reference drift.
notes: All pass validation report files were removed from the hot working tree; future pass validations are transient/current-publication only.
Fail/block validation reports would remain hot; none existed at migration time.
`scripts/codewiki-transaction.mjs` remains as internal/backward-compatible implementation filename; manifest capability is `codewiki.patch`.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Focused smoke test creates deprecated directories and stale legacy dot-wiki reference, then asserts lint issues.
Focused graph fixture verifies safe archived implementation build and pass validation are purgeable, not hot.
Full smoke test updated to bootstrap without `.codewiki/evidence` seed and to apply source-support patches under `.codewiki/sources/**`.
code_change_evidence: Config/template/gateway defaults removed `.codewiki/evidence/**` write/read paths and added sources/research patch paths.
Project/rebuilder defaults use `.codewiki/research` instead of evidence fallback.
Graph accepts archivedTaskIds, suppresses clean historical accepted-build drift, and exposes purgeable validation/build classes.
Lint enforces deprecated path and legacy dot-wiki reference drift.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `.codewiki/index/` and stale `.codewiki/evidence/**` files are removed or migrated, and templates/config no longer create or advertise them as default active paths.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Removed tracked `.codewiki/evidence/*`, removed legacy `.codewiki/index/`, added `.codewiki/research/.gitkeep`, updated current config and starter templates to use `research_root`, `.codewiki/sources/**`, and `.codewiki/research/**` instead of default evidence root.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Docs define execution evidence as implementation builds, validation truth as hot fail/block/policy-required/current reports, and research/source support outside `.codewiki/evidence/**`.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Updated file-structure, overview, validation-gateway, builds, graph, API, lexicon, README, and view-audit skill docs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Lint/graph health flags deprecated CodeWiki paths and stale `.wiki` references as deterministic file-contract drift.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `lintFileContract` reports deprecated `.codewiki/index/**`, deprecated `.codewiki/evidence/**`, and stale legacy dot-wiki references; `tests/smoke/hot-retention.test.mjs` covers all three.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Graph GC/archive views mark pass validation reports and consumed cold builds purgeable after safe Git archive/publication while preserving fail/block/policy-kept validation as hot.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Graph computes purgeable build/validation paths for safe archive ledgers, keeps fail/block validation in hot class, and treats closed historical builds as cold when archived task ids are present.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests cover deprecated path detection, stale `.wiki` detection, and validation/build hot-retention classes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added `tests/smoke/hot-retention.test.mjs`; updated build and smoke tests; full checks passed.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: User-facing API capability uses `codewiki.patch` while transaction remains internal mechanics where useful.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Gateway manifests now expose `codewiki.patch`, usage/docs say patch, templates use `patch_schema`, and internal transaction module remains implementation detail.

closure_brief.user_intent: Remove stale CodeWiki contract surfaces, prevent future file-contract drift, stop storing cold pass validation in the hot tree, and expose user-facing patch naming instead of transaction naming.
implemented_changes: Deprecated and removed `.codewiki/evidence/**` and `.codewiki/index/**` from active defaults.
Added lint enforcement for deprecated CodeWiki paths and legacy dot-wiki references.
Changed gateway/config/template docs to `codewiki.patch` naming and source/research patch paths.
Added graph retention classes for purgeable safe-archived builds and pass validations.
Removed existing pass validation files from hot working tree; cold proof remains in Git history.
Added hot-retention smoke coverage and updated bootstrap smoke expectations.
acceptance_evidence: All TASK-072 acceptance criteria mapped in implementation build acceptance_mapping.
non_goals_preserved: No Git history or archive refs rewritten.
No active implementation builds removed before publication safety passes.
No full restore command built in this task.
remaining_risks: External docs/tools may still refer to old evidence root or transaction capability name until updated downstream.

risks: Direct external consumers of `.codewiki/evidence/**` or `codewiki.transaction` manifest name must migrate to sources/research or `codewiki.patch`.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-072 Remove deprecated evidence/index surfaces and enforce hot validation retention implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented deprecated `.codewiki/evidence/**` and `.codewiki/index/**` removal, codewiki.patch naming, file-contract lint drift, and hot validation/build retention classes.

Checks: npm run typecheck, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm run test:pack, npm test
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
